response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified song title "Moechakka Fire" (モエチャッカファイア) from on-screen text.
2. Identified performers as Akai Haato and Hoshimachi Suisei from video context (#赤井はあと爆誕祭2025).
3. Performed search "Moechakka Fire" issey Japanese and English lyrics.
4. Used the search results to populate lyrics for the song.
5. Divided the video into a performance segment and a post-performance interaction segment.
response.global_summary: A performance of the song "Moechakka Fire" by VTubers Akai Haato and Hoshimachi Suisei, followed by a talk segment.

scenes.description: Akai Haato and Hoshimachi Suisei perform "Moechakka Fire" on a stage with red and purple lighting. Text in top left says 'モエチャッカファイア'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ようこそお越しなさったご主人様
隣に座ってせーの
萌 萌 萌 萌
こんなんで誰が喜ぶのさ
ねぇ教えて 笑顔で up, pull, pull
愛想を忘れてご苦労様
私とあなたでせーの
Luv, luv, luv, luv
こんなんで誰が喜ぶのさ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Welcome, dear Master!
Take a seat beside me, and here we go!
Moe, moe, moe, moe
Who would be happy with this kind of thing?
Hey, tell me, with a smile, up, pull, pull
Forget the pleasantries, good work!
You and I, and here we go!
Luv, luv, luv, luv
Who would be happy with this kind of thing?
